resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all game progress?
privacyBody: Ploopi Mini Games does not collect any personal data from your child. All game progress is saved locally on this device and is never sent to any server.
termsBody: Ploopi Mini Games Vol.1 is developed by Indahome for early-childhood education and entertainment purposes. Use of this app implies fair and age-appropriate use.
restoreBody: There are no purchases in this version yet. Purchase restoration will be available in a future release.
